data.title: Tether issued 1 billion USDT on the Tron network 4 hours ago
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, Tether issued 1 billion USDT on the Tron network 4 hours ago.
As of 2025, Tether Treasury has minted a total of 8 billion USDT on TronNetwork and destroyed 1 billion USDT on Ethereum.

data.title: Tether Treasury Issues $1 Billion USDT on Tron Network
data.description: According to PANews, Lookonchain has reported that the Tether Treasury recently issued an additional $1 billion USDT on the Tron network. Since the beginning of 2025, Tether has cumulatively issued $8 billion USDT on the Tron blockchain while destroying $1 billion USDT on the Ethereum blockchain.

data.title: FARTCOIN briefly broke through $0.78, up 49% in 24 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to OKX market data, FARTCOIN briefly broke through $0.78, up 49% in 24 hours.

data.title: Solana Swap (1SOS) is now available on Gate.io Launchpool
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io will start 1SOS staking mining from 14:00 on April 11 to 14:00 on April 16 (UTC+8). Staking USDT and 1SOS to participate in Launchpool will share 117,648 1SOS airdrops. Among them, the USDT new user pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 118.26%, and the 1SOS mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 535.06%. Early staking is now open.

data.title: Key Levels To Watch For XRP Price Amid Reversal Setup
data.description:
XRP price was, in a corrective pattern earlier today. Market analyst Dom has termed it the ‘Liquidity void’. This zone emerged at the end of November and is defined by a high-volatile, low trading-volume price hike. During this period, XRP appreciated without establishing enough support or resistance
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/09/key-levels-to-watch-for-xrp-price-amid-reversal-setup/

data.title: Planet Morning News
Trump's tariff suspension: Behind-the-scenes decision with Commerce and Treasury secretaries, some senior White House officials caught off guard
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Trump announced the suspension of tariff policy last night, causing violent market fluctuations. By compiling media information, the timeline behind the event is as follows: 
At 9:33 a.m. local time, Trump posted on Truth Social, asking everyone to "keep calm", and then added that "now is a good time to buy." 
At the same time, U.S. Commerce Secretary Lutnick received a call from Maros Sefcovic, the EU's top trade official, and the EU approved countermeasures against U.S. steel and aluminum tariffs that day. 
By noon on Wednesday, Lutnick had sat in the Oval Office of the White House with U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant and began to discuss the latest tariff policy with Trump. 
At 1:18 p.m., Trump announced the decision to suspend tariffs on Truth Social. 
It is reported that this sudden turn even caught some high-level officials off guard. After Trump posted the post, his assistants immediately stood up to discuss how to proceed, and Bessant and White House Press Secretary Levitt quickly held a press conference. 
After announcing the suspension of tariffs, Trump told reporters that he had been considering changing course over the past few days and the final decision "may have been made early this morning." (Wall Street News)

data.title: Ethereum contributor Virgil Griffith released from prison; pardon on the way?
data.description:
Virgil Griffith, a key figure in Ethereum’s early development and known for his work on the Ethereum Name Service (ENS), has been released from prison on parole and transferred to a halfway house, according to updates shared on X on Wednesday, April 9, 2025. Griffith was sentenced to 63 months in prison in 2022 after […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/virgil-griffith-released-from-prison/

data.title: Key trading data: U.S. 10-year Treasury yield fell to 4.259%, MOVE index fell to 128.8294
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to market information, affected by Trump's tariff suspension policy, the US 10-year Treasury yield fell to 4.259%, a drop of 3.07% in the past 24 hours.
In addition, the MOVE index fell to 128.8294, a drop of 7.9% in the past 24 hours.

data.title: A high-leverage whale switched from ETH short to BTC long, making a profit of more than $6 million in 24 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a trader who went long on BTC with 40x leverage on Hyperliquid has currently earned $4.27 million in unrealized profits. He closed his ETH short position on MUX 11 hours ago and switched to going long on BTC, with a total profit of $6.16 million in 24 hours.
